001package guiTools;
002
003import javafx.scene.Scene;
004import javafx.stage.Stage;
005import entityClasses.User;
006
007
008/*******
009 * <p> Title: GUISingleRoleDispatch Class. </p>
010 * 
011 * <p> Description: The class dispatches the execution to the appropriate role's home
012 * page when the user has only one role.  This is not actually a GUI page... it just dispatches
013 * to an actual GUI page for the specified role.
014 * 
015 * WHen a user has more than one role, a different
016 * class, GUIMultipleRoleHomePage, asks the user which of their roles do they want to use,
017 * and then it dispatches the user to that role's home page.</p>
018 * 
019 * <p> Copyright: Lynn Robert Carter © 2025 </p>
020 * 
021 * @author Lynn Robert Carter
022 * 
023 * @version 1.00                2025-04-20 Initial version
024 *  
025 */
026
027public class GUISingleRoleDispatch {
028        
029        /**********************************************************************************************
030
031        Attributes
032        
033        **********************************************************************************************/
034        
035        // These are the application values required by the user interface
036
037        
038        public Scene theViewStudentHomeScene;
039
040
041        
042        /**********************************************************************************************
043
044        Constructors
045        
046        **********************************************************************************************/
047
048        
049        /**********
050         * <p> Method: GUISingleRoleDispatch() </p>
051         * 
052         * <p> Description: This method initializes all the elements of the graphical user interface. 
053         * This method determines the location, size, font, color, and change and event handlers for 
054         * each GUI object. </p>
055         * 
056         */
057        public GUISingleRoleDispatch() {
058        }
059
060        
061        /**********
062         * <p> Method: doSingleRoleDispatch(Stage ps, Pane theRoot, Database database, User user) </p>
063         * 
064         * <p> Description: This method is called after a GUI page has already been established and
065         * it is being display with potentially new contents for the various GUI elements. </p>
066         * 
067         * @param ps specifies the JavaFX Stage to be used for this GUI and it's methods
068         * 
069         * @param theRoot specifies the JavaFX Pane to be used for this GUI and it's methods
070         * 
071         * @param database specifies the Database to be used by this GUI and it's methods
072         * 
073         * @param user specifies the User for this GUI and it's methods
074         * 
075         */
076        public static void doSingleRoleDispatch(Stage ps, User user) {
077                System.out.println("************** Just entered single role dispatch page");
078
079                if (user.getAdminRole()) {
080                        guiAdminHome.ViewAdminHome.displayAdminHome(ps, user);
081                } else if (user.getStudentRole()) {
082                        guiStudentHome.ViewStudentHome.displayStudentHome(ps, user);
083                } else if (user.getStaffRole()) {
084                        guiStaffHome.ViewStaffHome.displayStaffHome(ps, user);
085                } else {
086                        // Invalid role
087                        System.out.println("*** ERROR *** GUISingleRoleDispatch was asked to dispatch to " +
088                        "a role that is not supported!");
089                }
090        }
091}
